patch.value: registerProfile core registration surface: ExtensionApi + registry + loader gate + capability-usage + policy surface

Add api.registerProfile(profile) to ExtensionApi. New RegisteredExtensionProjectProfile type; profiles[] on ExtensionRegistrationRegistry + count on ExtensionRegistrationCounts; profiles:[] in createEmptyExtensionRegistrationRegistry. Loader registerProfile: validate the ProjectProfileDefinition, assertExtensionCapability(schema), allowRegistration('schema.profiles'). Add 'schema.profiles' to KNOWN_EXTENSION_POLICY_SURFACES. capability-usage: registerProfile under schema surfaces + record(registrations.profiles,'schema').

Shipped in #401 (92fe8bae): api.registerProfile + RegisteredExtensionProjectProfile + registry/counts + loader gate (schema cap + schema.profiles policy surface) + clone→validate→default with per-entry object validation; capability-usage attributes profiles to schema.
Core registerProfile registration surface shipped in PR #401: ExtensionApi, registry/counts, loader validation/gating, schema.profiles policy surface, and capability usage are on main.
Extensions with schema capability can register validated project profiles through api.registerProfile without shadowing core contracts.
registerProfile is implemented in core loader/types/registries/policy/capability usage and verified by extension-register-profile, loader, profile, SDK, and full coverage tests.
